phases.name: Scaffold, public repository, and GitHub Pages
completed_items: Reviewable project scaffold
Static GitHub Pages site
Scaffold validation tests
Standalone git repository
GitHub Pages workflow definition

phases.name: LOCUS-v1 ingestion, jurisdiction table, gap finder, and seed queue
completed_items: Add guarded LOCUS ingestion script without committing downloaded records
Create master jurisdiction table contract
Draft production Local Law Analytics Platform architecture and starter code
Implement Polars-first evaluator vertical slice
Complete mandatory synthetic validation
Run bounded browser demo smoke test
Refresh GitHub Pages evaluator status
Promote GitHub Pages to primary browser evaluator surface
Publish synthetic map, ontology, model registry, inquiry, chart, and progressive-disclosure artifacts
Download LOCUS-v1 Parquet shards into ignored local storage
Publish aggregate-only LOCUS map, ontology, inquiry, model, chart, and status artifacts for top 1,000 jurisdiction units
Add Pages-side aggregate map filters for state, topic, function, tier, and minimum law count
Add filtered-view aggregate insight cards and inquiry answers
Add filtered-vs-full aggregate comparison panels
Add Charts-tab state/topic small multiples from the aggregate map layer
Add GitHub Pages analysis-status panel with publication gates and artifact provenance
Add county/town aggregate coverage atlas in the Charts tab
Add official Census TIGERweb county choropleth for matched aggregate county units
Add official Census TIGERweb municipal/town point layer for matched aggregate municipal units
remaining_items: Run full real LOCUS local-Parquet audit and manifest generation

phases.name: GitHub Pages dashboard extensions
remaining_items: GeoViz landing page in browser app

source_citation.citation: Denis Peskoff, Joe Barrow, Christopher Vu, and Diag Davenport. "Freeing the Law with LOCUS: A Local Ordinance Corpus for the United States." arXiv:2606.19334, 2026.
